jobs.title: Recruitment for 450 Vacancies across 54 posts in various Central Government Ministries and Departments (Advertisement No. 07/2026)
jobs.summary: The Union Public Service Commission has released 450 vacancies across 54 posts in various Central Government Ministries and Departments. This recruitment drive covers a diverse mix of technical and administrative roles, including Drug Inspector, Company Prosecutor, Assistant Engineer (Civil and allied disciplines), Legal Officer, Scientific Officer/Programmer, and Specialist Grade III / Assistant Professor (medical).
jobs.fitLabel: While some technical roles like 'Scientific Officer/Programmer' exist, most government IT posts require a CS/IT/Electronics degree, which the candidate (B.Tech Mechanical) does not possess, making these roles 'gated'. Other listed posts (Drug Inspector, Company Prosecutor, Assistant Engineer (Civil and allied disciplines), Legal Officer, Specialist Grade III / Assistant Professor) are either irrelevant or not directly aligned with the candidate's profile and interests.

jobs.title: Direct Recruitment to various posts in Government of India (Advt. No. 07/2026)
jobs.summary: UPSC has released 450 vacancies across 54 posts in various Central Government Ministries and Departments. Key posts include Drug Inspector, Assistant Engineer, Legal Officer, Company Prosecutor, Scientific Officer, and Specialist Grade III.
jobs.fitLabel: Includes some technical/administrative roles; IT roles like Scientific Officer/Programmer are likely gated due to degree requirements. Core mechanical engineering roles need to be verified within the detailed notification.

jobs.fitLabel: The IT Officer role, a primary interest, requires a CS/IT/Electronics degree, which the candidate does not possess. Other specialist roles also typically require specific non-mechanical degrees.
